8:["$","$L19",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# Shared episodic + semantic\nshared_mem = Memory(db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\")\n\n# Per-agent working memory\nagent_a = Memory(\n  db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\",\n  agent_id=\"agent-a\",\n  working_isolation=True,\n)\n\nagent_b = Memory(\n  db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\",\n  agent_id=\"agent-b\",\n  working_isolation=True,\n)\n\n# Agent A stores team observation\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"The API rate limit is 1000 req/min.\",\n  tags=[\"infrastructure\", \"team-knowledge\"],\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n\n# Agent B recalls it\nresults = agent_b.recall(\"API rate limit\")\n","language":"python"}]
